title: Enum names not saved in the vcd

features.name: fsm_enum_with_clog2_sizing
features.description: Code should include a typedef enum with $clog2-based sizing using a localparam integer constant, typical for FSM state machines

features.name: enum_signal_in_fsm_module
features.description: Code should include a module with an enum-typed signal used in FSM state transitions
features.snippet:
xbar_state_t state, next_state;
always_ff @(posedge clk) state <= next_state;
